inputs.text: Maine kal raat se bahut tezi se bukhar aa raha hai, aur mere sir mein bahut dard hai

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Acute onset of high fever and severe headache

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Non-specific symptoms of fever and headache

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, other symptoms are not yet present

inputs.text: Aaj mere aankhon ke peeche dard ho raha hai, aur mere haddiyan toot rahi hain

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Retro-orbital pain and bone pain are characteristic symptoms

hypotheses.label: Chikungunya
hypotheses.rationale: Although joint pain is common, eye pain is not typical

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Non-specific symptoms, but not as specific as Dengue

inputs.text: Mere bukhar kam ho gaya hai, lekin mere chehre par lal daane nikal aaye hain, aur mere masoodon se khoon aa raha hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Fever drop, rash, and bleeding gums are cardinal signs of Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Although fever drop is common, rash and bleeding gums are not typical

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Not as likely, given the presence of rash and bleeding gums

inputs.text: Main abhi bahut kamzor hoon, aur mere shareer mein bahut dard hai

hypotheses.label: Dengue
hypotheses.rationale: Extreme weakness and abdominal distension are common in severe Dengue

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, given the presence of specific Dengue symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, given the absence of typical Malaria symptoms
